company_types: Commercial real estate operators with complex facilities
icp.size: 1,000+ employees, multi-facility operations, significant maintenance budgets
use_cases: 3D digital twin scanning of complex facilities
Knowledge transfer from retiring veteran employees
Site-specific training for new hires using digital replicas
pain_points: Veteran employees retiring with decades of facility knowledge — no way to capture it
Maintenance teams can't locate assets or visualize work orders in context
Training new hires on complex facilities is slow and inconsistent
No single source of truth for facility layout, assets, and SOPs
Outage planning and facility upgrades rely on outdated drawings and tribal knowledge
buying_triggers: Wave of retirements losing institutional knowledge
Major facility outage or maintenance failure
New plant manager or VP of Operations hired
Facility expansion or acquisition requiring documentation
Safety incident linked to poor asset visibility or training gaps
Digital transformation initiative from executive leadership
